zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre於大約1457年出生在英國素可時，他的父親Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre28歲，母親Lady Catharine Hungerford23歲。他於大約1475年與Eleanor Percy在英國素可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1497年登記服兵役。他去世於1525年10月11日在英國素可布洛阿德沃特享年69歲，埋葬在英國素可布洛阿德沃特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre于大约1457年出生在英国素可时，他的父亲Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre28岁，母亲Lady Catharine Hungerford23岁。他于大约1475年与Eleanor Percy在英国素可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1497年登记服兵役。他去世于1525年10月11日在英国素可布洛阿德沃特享年69岁，埋葬在英国素可布洛阿德沃特。

nameMeanings.name: West
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: from Middle English, Middle High German west ‘west’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived to the west of a settlement, or a habitational name for someone who had migrated from further west.
Americanized form of Finnish Vesterinen: from the personal name Vesteri (a short form of Sylvester ) + the surname suffix -nen.

History: This name was brought to North America independently by many bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. Thomas West, 12th Baron De La Warre, was captain general of Virginia in 1610–11. The state of DE is named for him. One of the earliest permanent settlers was Francis West (1606–92), who came to Duxbury, MA, from Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, in or before 1638.

variants.name: Western
meanings: English: from Middle English westerne ‘western’, denoting ‘(the man from the) west’. Compare West and Wester .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Vestern, found in two places, a compound of vest ‘west’ + vin ‘meadow’, denoting a farm to the west.

variants.name: Sylvester
meanings: English and German: from the Middle English and Latin personal name Silvester ‘dweller in the forest’ (a derivative of silva ‘wood’). The name was borne by three popes, including a contemporary of Constantine the Great, and seems to have been first used in England by clerics.

variants.name: Westman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Birgit, Erik, Hilmer, Nels.
Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from (an altered form of) the elements väst ‘west’ + -man. It is also found in Finland.
Americanized form of German Westmann: variant of West , with the addition of Middle High German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre was born about 1457, in Sussex, England, his father, Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre, was 28 and his mother, Lady Catharine Hungerford, was 23. He married Eleanor Percy about 1475, in Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He registered for military service in 1497. He died on 11 October 1525, in Broadwater, Sussex, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Broadwater, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre est né environ 1457, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Catharine Hungerford, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Percy environ 1475, à Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1497. Il est décédé le 11 octobre 1525, à Broadwater, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Broadwater, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.Newton Tony, Wiltshire, England: Newton Tony, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre um 1457 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre 28 und seine Mutter Lady Catharine Hungerford 23. Er hat um 1475 in Sussex, England Eleanor Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1497 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 11. Oktober 1525 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Broadwater, Sussex, England und wurde in Broadwater, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre è nato il circa 1457 nel Sussex, England, il suo padre, Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Lady Catharine Hungerford, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Percy circa 1475, nel Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1497. Morì il 11 ottobre 1525, nel Broadwater, Sussex, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Broadwater, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warreが約1457年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Richard West 7th Baron de la Warreは28歳，母Lady Catharine Hungerfordは23歳であった。約1475年にイギリススセックスでEleanor Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1497年に兵役登録をした。彼は1525年10月11日にイギリススセックスブロアドワターで69歳で死去し，イギリススセックスブロアドワターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre(이)가 대략 1457년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Catharine Hungerford(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1475년 영국 수세스에서 Eleanor Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1497년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1525년 10월 11일 영국 수세스 브로드왓어에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 브로드왓어에 묻혔다.

pt.Newton Tony, Wiltshire, England: Newton Tony, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre nasceu aproximadamente 1457, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catharine Hungerford, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Percy aproximadamente 1475, em Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1497. Ele faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1525, em Broadwater, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Broadwater, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ro.Newton Tony, Wiltshire, England: Newton Tony, Wiltshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre родился около 1457 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catharine Hungerford, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Percy около 1475 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1497 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 11 октября 1525 г. в местности броадвэитир, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности броадвэитир, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre nació aproximadamente 1457, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Catharine Hungerford, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Eleanor Percy aproximadamente 1475, en Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1497. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1525, en Broadwater, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Broadwater, Sussex, Inglaterra.
